_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

_contextSnippet: We processed over 100 cNFs in total; those with sizes greater than 0.5 cm were processed individually and yielded between 0.3 and 7.5 million cells/cNF
details: Successfully established from 100+ cNFs with 66% success rate from 12 patients, yielding 0.3-7.5 million cells per cNF and demonstrating exponential growth over time
